title: StructuralCatalyst
description: A secular, ongoing macro trend (not a discrete event). Validated by persistent indicators, not a single headline. Decays slowly over months/years.

description.description: Full description of the trend, its mechanism, and why it is structural (not episodic).

created_by.description: Structural catalysts are typically user-defined. System may propose based on flow anomaly detection.

onset_period.description: Quarter when the structural trend became clearly established. Format: YYYY-QN.

onset_evidence.description: Specific data or event that marks the onset. Must be falsifiable/cited.

user_rank.description: User-assigned priority. 1=highest conviction. null=unranked. v1.5: used as a display ORDERING tiebreaker (see scoring_weights.yaml user_rank_ordering), not a score multiplier.

current_score.description: COMPUTED from the continuous indicator scores. Formula in scoring_weights.yaml (v1.5): round(clamp(indicator_avg + trend_delta, 10, 95), 1). Do NOT assign manually after initial bootstrap. Run /catalyx-update to recompute after any indicator change.

computation_method.description: bootstrap = initial manual estimate at creation. computed = derived from indicator semaphores (use after first indicator update). user_override = manual override with documented justification.

computation_note.description: Required when computation_method = user_override. Explain why formula result was overridden.

narrative_maturity.description: Categorical narrative saturation level. See scoring_weights.yaml narrative_maturity_levels for anchored criteria. More stable than a 0-100 score across LLM sessions.

indicators.description: Observable data series that confirm the trend is active and measure its intensity.

direction.description: Which direction of this indicator confirms the structural trend.

threshold_strong.description: Value above/below which trend is confirmed as strong. Maps to the linear-fallback 'strong' anchor (100).

threshold_weak.description: Value above/below which trend is considered weakening. Maps to the linear-fallback 'weak' anchor (50).

indicator_weight.description: Optional weight for this indicator in the intensity average. null = equal weight.

value_history.description: DEPRECATED (schema 1.4): externalized to the parquet lake at data/lake/indicators/indicator_history.parquet (catalyst_id, indicator_id, date, value, source). intensity_engine reads the lake first and only falls back to this inline array for catalysts not yet migrated. New observations go to the lake via catalyx.store.indicator_history.append_observation — do NOT append here. Kept one major version per the Schema Change Protocol.

score.description: DERIVED — continuous [0,100] indicator score written by intensity_engine (percentile or linear fallback). Do not set manually.

semaphore.description: DERIVED display-only color (🟢/🟡/🔴) computed from `score` via indicator_color_thresholds. v1.5: no longer drives the math.

linked_event_catalyst_ids.description: Event catalysts that are acceleration events within this structural trend.

linked_structural_catalyst_ids.description: Other structural catalysts that share thematic overlap or create compounding demand on the same sectors.
